title: nephrodium distans
intro: Nephrodium distans, also known as the spreading lady fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Nephrodium distans include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as a natural diuretic. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in folk remedies and alternative medicine.
